title: Response to Medical Emergencies - Washington Department of Corrections

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Washington Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All written policies and procedures of the Washington Department of Corrections governing responses to medical emergencies, including policies related to the transport of incarcerated individuals to community hospitals or other external medical facilities.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Sophie Choong

title: BWC Request: USPS Armed Robbery Pursuit — K9 and Grappler Takedown

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Public Records Request — Body-Worn Camera Footage: USPS Armed Robbery Pursuit

To Whom It May Concern,

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) / applicable state public records law, I am requesting access to the following public records:

All body-worn camera (BWC) footage, dashcam footage, and any other audio or video recordings related to the following incident:

Case/Incident: USPS Armed Robbery Pursuit — K9 and Grappler Takedown
Date of Incident: December 31, 2024
Agency: YouTube
Summary: High-stakes pursuit of armed robbery suspect in Cleveland Ohio. Cuyahoga County Sheriff bodycam captures K9 units and grappler device taking down suspect after USPS robbery....

This request includes:
1. All body-worn camera footage from any officers involved in the incident
2. All dashcam / in-car camera footage from responding vehicles
3. Any booking room, interview room, or holding area footage related to this incident
4. Any associated arrest reports or incident reports (if not exempt)

I request that this footage be provided electronically if possible (via download link, USB, or email attachment).

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance. If any portion of this request is denied, please cite the specific statutory exemption being claimed.

Thank you for your assistance.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Sam O

title: BWC Request: Sophia Ross — Hooters Waitress Calls Cop "Daddy," Offers "Anything" to Avoid DUI

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

Public Records Request — Body-Worn Camera Footage: Sophia Ross

To Whom It May Concern,

Pursuant to the Florida Public Records Law (Chapter 119, Florida Statutes), I am requesting access to the following public records:

All body-worn camera (BWC) footage, dashcam footage, and any other audio or video recordings related to the following incident:

Case/Incident: Sophia Ross — Hooters Waitress Calls Cop "Daddy," Offers "Anything" to Avoid DUI Arrest
Date of Incident: November 16, 2024
Agency: Sarasota Police Department
Summary: Sophia Ross, 22, pulled over in Sarasota FL on Nov 17 2024 after stopping at green lights and hitting curbs. On 30-min bodycam she slurs her words, calls the officer "babe" and "daddy," flashes her Ho...


Note: I understand this footage has already been released to media outlets. I am requesting the same footage be provided directly to me as a member of the public under the applicable records law.

This request includes:
1. All body-worn camera footage from any officers involved in the incident
2. All dashcam / in-car camera footage from responding vehicles
3. Any booking room, interview room, or holding area footage related to this incident
4. Any associated arrest reports or incident reports (if not exempt)

I request that this footage be provided electronically if possible (via download link, USB, or email attachment).

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance. If any portion of this request is denied, please cite the specific statutory exemption being claimed.

Thank you for your assistance.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Sam O
